response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-01:03.400: Identified as intro and talk. 2. 01:03.400-01:21.000: Detected song 'Serendipity' based on banner text. 3. 01:21.000-03:37.000: Identified as banter and transition. 4. 03:37.000-05:00.000: Detected song 'Zen Koutei' and searched for lyrics. Found official lyrics on uta-net.com.
response.global_summary: A concert performance featuring VTubers Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame and Nerissa Ravencroft. The video includes an introduction, a performance of the original song 'Serendipity', followed by a transition and a performance of the song 'Zen Koutei'.

scenes.description: VTubers Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame and Nerissa Ravencroft introduce themselves and interact with the audience.
Performance of the song 'Serendipity'. The performers sing and dance on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
It's wonderful...
Somehow we met along the way
Now here you are beside me
Embracing Serendipity.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:

scenes.description: Banter between the performers and transition to the next song.
Performance of the song 'Zen Koutei'. The performers sing and dance on stage.
